scripts.clean: if exist .nuxt rmdir /s /q .nuxt & if exist .output rmdir /s /q .output & if exist node_modules\.cache\nuxt rmdir /s /q node_modules\.cache\nuxt & if exist 0.0.0.0 rmdir /s /q 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev: if exist .output\server\index.mjs (set PORT=8008&& set HOST=0.0.0.0&& node .output/server/index.mjs) else (npm run build && set PORT=8008&& set HOST=0.0.0.0&& node .output/server/index.mjs)
